name: oneepis
description: Ficha clinica inteligente, modular y auditable.

scripts.check:web: npm run check:size && npm --workspace apps/web run typecheck && npm --workspace apps/web run lint && npm --workspace apps/web run build
scripts.check:contract: node scripts/export-openapi.mjs && node scripts/check-assistant-read-contract.mjs && git diff --exit-code packages/contracts/openapi.json
scripts.check:e2e: npm --workspace apps/web run test:e2e && npm --workspace apps/web run test:e2e:assistant-read
scripts.check: npm run check:api && npm run check:web && npm run check:contract && npm run check:e2e
